spans.content: T3T33
DIRECTORATE GENERAL OF GOODS& SERVICES
TAXINTELLIGENCE,ZONAL UNIT,AHMEDABAD
6th & 7th Floor,“I-the Address”,Opp.H.C.G.Hospital,
NearSola Flyover,Sola,Ahmedabad,Gujarat-380060
Alert Notice No.O/2024-25
Sub:Alert Notice regarding availment/passing on of Input Tax
Credit (ITC) on the strength of bogus invoices without any
supply of corresponding goods to/from M/s Shakti Agro Chem&
Fertilizers (GSTIN:24DKMPP44O1F1ZB) -reg.
Intelligence/information was received from the DGGI,Zonal Unit,
Ahmedabad that various suppliers/aggregators are involved in the
diversion of Agriculture Grade Urea (AGU) for industrial use,leading to
lossto Government exchequer.Further,it was informed that commodity
viz.Technical Grade Urea (TGU) falls under HSN 3102 and attracts 18%
GST,whereas Agriculture Grade Urea also fall under HSN 31O2 and the
sameis taxable@5% in GST.Intelligence furtherrevealed that these firms
werealso involved in bogus invoice transactions to claim fake Input Tax
Credit.
2.An investigation is carried out against one such firm in the name of
M/s.MHAcid and Chemicals,Rajkotwhich is found to be involved in the
availment offake ITC from the fake/non-existent firms and diversion of
AGU to TGU.Also,itwas observed that M/s.MH Acid and Chemicals,
Rajkot had shown inward supplies of TGU from M/s.Shakti Agro Chem
andFertilizers (GSTIN:24DKMPP44O1F1ZB).Accordingly,an investigation
was initiated against the above said supplier firm viz.M/s.Shakti Agro
Chem and Fertilizers.The said firm was registered as proprietary firm of
Smt.Ilaben Patel and had obtained the GST registration on 13.o9.2017.
Theregistration wascancelled suo-moto effective from O1.1O.2018.
Workingon the collected intelligence,DGGI,Zonal Unit,Ahmedabad
conducted a search operation at the registered premises of M/s.Shakti

Ahmedabad that various suppliers/aggregators are involved in the
diversion of Agriculture Grade Urea (AGU) for industrial use,leading to
lossto Government exchequer.Further,it was informed that commodity
viz.Technical Grade Urea (TGU) falls under HSN 3102 and attracts 18%
GST,whereas Agriculture Grade Urea also fall under HSN 31O2 and the
sameis taxable@5% in GST.Intelligence furtherrevealed that these firms
werealso involved in bogus invoice transactions to claim fake Input Tax
Credit.
2.An investigation is carried out against one such firm in the name of
M/s.MHAcid and Chemicals,Rajkotwhich is found to be involved in the
availment offake ITC from the fake/non-existent firms and diversion of
AGU to TGU.Also,itwas observed that M/s.MH Acid and Chemicals,

Theregistration wascancelled suo-moto effective from O1.1O.2018.

spans.content: We,the above detailed persons,on being called upon by a person who
introduces himself as Shri Navdeep Singh Sidhu,Intelligence Officer,
Directorate General of GST Intelligence (DGGI)，Ahmedabad Zonal Unit,
Ahmedabad,present ourselvesat Radhey Corner,Lal Gebi Circle,S.P.Ring
Road,Hathijan,Ahmedabad,382445.Shri Navdeep Singh Sidhu,IO informs
usthata search in premise of M/s.Shakti Agro Chem& Fertilizer (GSTIN:
24DKMPP4401F1ZB) registered in GST at shopno.1O,2ND Floor,Radhey
Corner,Lal Gebi Circle,S.P.RingRoad,Hathijan,Ahmedabad,382445,is to
beconducted in thematter of evasion of Goodsand Services Taxand shows
us the Authorization for Search (GST-INS-O1） bearing CBIC DIN -
202205DWW30000000CA8 dated 25/05/2022 issued under Section-67(2) of
the Central Goodsand Services Tax Act,2017,by the Additional Director,
DGGI,Ahmedabad Zonal Unitwhich isvalid for O2 days for search at the
above said address.The officer then requests us to witness the said search
proceedingsas independent Panchasand also requestsusto remain present
during entire search proceedings. We,give our consent to witness the said
search proceedingsas independent Panchas and agree to remain present at
the premises till the completion of the entire search proceeding and we put
ourdated signature on the said Authorization for Search bearing CBIC DIN-
202205DWW30000000CA8 dated 25/05/2022.Shri Navdeep Singh Sidhu,
IOthen introduces other accompanying officer as Shri Kopula Balakrishna,
IO，DGGI-Ahmedabad Zonal Unit，Ahmedabad (hereinafter called as“the
Officers”for brevity).
We both the panchas and the officers wearing masks and by
maintaining proper social distance,arrive at the entrance of the registered
Before me,
W
(Navdeep Singh Sidhu）
Intelligence Officer,
DGGI,Ahmedabad Zonal Unit
P2U.
(Shri.Tejas PJolapara)
PANCHNAMA DRAWN AT M/s SHAKTI AGRO CHEM & FERTILIZER
(GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F1ZB) AT SHOP NO.10, 2nd FLOOR, RADHEY

the son of Smt. Ilaben Patel since 1st April, 2022 but he has not executed the
rent agreement yet. The officers then show Shri. Tejas P Jolapara
AuthorizationforSearch(GST-INS-01)bearing
CBICDIN
202205DwW30000000CA8 dated 25/05/2022 issued under Section-67(2) of
the Central Goods and Services Tax Act,2017,by the Additional Director,
DGGI,Ahmedabad Zonal Unit and as token of confirmation Shri. Tejas P
Jolaparam puts his dated signature on Authorization for Search (GST-INS-
O1). The officers in presence of we the panchas offer their personal search to
Shri.Tejas PJolapara to which he declines politely. Upon asked by the officers
to call the owner of the shop,Shri. Tejas P Jolapara (mobile no.9879564583)
calls Shri.Ankit patel on mobile no.8849022903 in presence of we the
panchas and the officers,Shri. Ankit Patel attends the call and informs Shri.
TejasPJolapara thatheand his familyincludinghismother Smt.Ilaben Patel
and his father Shri.ChandrakantR Patel are outof Ahmedabad and cannot
come at this moment. The officers then in presence of we the panchas check
the
registeredpremisesofM/s. Vinayak RoadTech(GSTIN
24AZBPJ0114C2ZC) on GST network on the laptop brought by the officers
and it is noticed that the principal place of business ofM/s.Vinayak Road
Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2) is B/32，Akshardham Ind Estate，under
Ramol Bridge,Ramol GIDC Vatva,Ahmedabad,Gujarat,382445and no other
additional place of business is registered in the registration details of M/s.
Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2ZC).The officers in presenceof
we the panchas inquire from Shri. Tejas P Jolapara as to why shop no. 10,
2ND Floor，Radhey Corner，Lal Gebi Circle,S.P.Ring Road，Hathijan,
Ahmedabad，382445 from where M/s.Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN
24AZBPJ0114C2ZC) is currently being operated hasnot been shown in the
registration detailsof M/s.Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2ZC)
to which Shri.Tejas P Jolapara informs the officers in presence of we the
panchas thatas the rent agreement has not been executed yet therefore he
has not filed for amendment in the GST registration.In presence of we the
panchas,the officers start the search of the shop however no documents
related to M/s.Shakti Agro Chem&Fertilizer (GSTIN:24DKMPP4401F1ZB)
arefound at the premises however some records related to M/s.Vinayak Road
Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2ZC) and one more firm namely M/s.Vinayak
Engineers having GST No.24ABPPD1014M1ZW are recovered from the shop.
The officers inquire about M/s.Vinayak Engineers from Shri.Tejas P
Jolapara to which he replies that he was the proprietor of the firm M/s.
Vinayak Engineers (GST No.24ABPPD1014M1ZW) butas he hasnot filed the
GSTreturnsof the said firm,the GSTregistration of the firm M/s.Vinayak

DGGI,Ahmedabad Zonal Unit and as token of confirmation Shri. Tejas P
Jolaparam puts his dated signature on Authorization for Search (GST-INS-
O1). The officers in presence of we the panchas offer their personal search to
Shri.Tejas PJolapara to which he declines politely. Upon asked by the officers
to call the owner of the shop,Shri. Tejas P Jolapara (mobile no.9879564583)
calls Shri.Ankit patel on mobile no.8849022903 in presence of we the
panchas and the officers,Shri. Ankit Patel attends the call and informs Shri.
TejasPJolapara thatheand his familyincludinghismother Smt.Ilaben Patel
and his father Shri.ChandrakantR Patel are outof Ahmedabad and cannot
come at this moment. The officers then in presence of we the panchas check
the
registeredpremisesofM/s. Vinayak RoadTech(GSTIN
24AZBPJ0114C2ZC) on GST network on the laptop brought by the officers
and it is noticed that the principal place of business ofM/s.Vinayak Road
Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2) is B/32，Akshardham Ind Estate，under
Ramol Bridge,Ramol GIDC Vatva,Ahmedabad,Gujarat,382445and no other
additional place of business is registered in the registration details of M/s.
Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2ZC).The officers in presenceof
we the panchas inquire from Shri. Tejas P Jolapara as to why shop no. 10,
2ND Floor，Radhey Corner，Lal Gebi Circle,S.P.Ring Road，Hathijan,
Ahmedabad，382445 from where M/s.Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN
24AZBPJ0114C2ZC) is currently being operated hasnot been shown in the
registration detailsof M/s.Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2ZC)
to which Shri.Tejas P Jolapara informs the officers in presence of we the
panchas thatas the rent agreement has not been executed yet therefore he
has not filed for amendment in the GST registration.In presence of we the
panchas,the officers start the search of the shop however no documents
related to M/s.Shakti Agro Chem&Fertilizer (GSTIN:24DKMPP4401F1ZB)
arefound at the premises however some records related to M/s.Vinayak Road
Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2ZC) and one more firm namely M/s.Vinayak
Engineers having GST No.24ABPPD1014M1ZW are recovered from the shop.
The officers inquire about M/s.Vinayak Engineers from Shri.Tejas P
Jolapara to which he replies that he was the proprietor of the firm M/s.
Vinayak Engineers (GST No.24ABPPD1014M1ZW) butas he hasnot filed the
GSTreturnsof the said firm,the GSTregistration of the firm M/s.Vinayak

Engineers (GST No.24ABPPD1014M1ZW) was cancelled by the GST

invoices pertaining to firm M/s.Sabarmati Fertilizer and Chemicals
Industries Private Limited (24AAYCS3916Q1ZE) having registered premises
at shop no.1O,2ND Floor,Radhey Corner,Lal Gebi Circle,S.P.Ring Road,
Hathijan，Ahmedabad，382445 issued by M/s.Mitachem Pulveriser
Industries and M/s. SGS India Private Limited. The offcers in presence of
we the panchas inquire from Shri. Tejas P Jolapara about M/s. Sabarmati
Fertilizer and Chemicals Industries Private Limited (24AAYCS3916Q1ZE) to
which he replies that he is not aware of M/s.Sabarmati Fertilizer and
Chemicals Industries Private Limited (24AAYCS3916Q1ZE). The officers in
presence of we the panchas under the reasonable belief that the documents
related to M/s.Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2ZC)，M/s.
Vinayak Engineers (GST No.24ABPPD1014M1ZW) and M/s.Sabarmati
Fertilizer and Chemicals Industries Private Limited (24AAYCS3916Q1ZE) may
be useful for further investigation withdraw the records pertaining to the
three firms recovered from shop no.10,2ND Floor,Radhey Corner,Lal Gebi
Circle，S.P.RingRoad,Hathijan，Ahmedabad,382445 under Panchnama
proceedings.The said documentsare seized by the officers in presence ofwe
the panchas as detailed in Form GST INS-02.
This Panchnama has been recorded as per our say and version with
our consent in laptop and printer of the officers.No untoward incidence
happened during the course of the entire Panchnama proceedings and
nobody's religious feelings were hurt and the entire search proceedingswere
carried out inavery peacefuland cordial manner.All the factsand figures
narrated in this Panchnama are true and correct andall the contents of the
Panchnama have been explained to us in the local language and in token of
its correctness we the Panchas put ourdated signature in all the pages of this
Panchnama.Shri.Tejas PJolapara puts his dated signature on all the pages
of this panchnama.We theabove detailed Panchas,all the Officersand Shri.
Tejas P Jolapara remain present during the entire course of Panchnama
proceedings.After completion of Panchnama proceedings and before leaving
thepremisesall theofficersand we the Panchasoffer for personal search to
Shri.TejasPJolapara to which he politely declines.During the panchnama
proceedings all protocol related to pandemic Covid-19 has been followed.The
Panchnama proceedings commenced at 15:00 Hrs.on 25/05/2022 and
concludedat21:30Hrs.on the same dayi.e.,25/05/2022.
